# ArDD Version

_Source: artifact-driven-dev @ def5678 · Installed/updated 2026-07-16_

Source-Path: /home/example/.ardd/source
Source-Commit: def5678901234567890123456789012345678901
Source-Ref: v1.2.3-beta.2
Channel: stable

This file is committed so the project's history shows which ArDD skill
version was active at any point. `.claude/skills/` is regenerated by
`install.sh` from that source commit and should be gitignored, not
committed.
